mapper.select: SELECT USER_NO, USER_ID, USER_PWD, USER_NAME, AUTHORITY, USER_DELETE_YN FROM MEMBER WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND USER_DELETE_YN = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MEMBER VALUES( SEQ_USER_NO.NEXTVAL, 1, #{userId}, #{userPwd}, #{userName}, #{userAddress}, #{userPhone}, #{userEmail}, DEFAULT, DEFAULT, DEFAULT, DEFAULT, DEFAULT )
